message:
fix(scope): replace tuple-struct CatchUnwind with pin-projected struct field

The CatchUnwind future wrapper previously used a tuple struct with a
manually-pinned Box<F> field (CatchUnwind(Pin<Box<F>>)). This had a subtle
unsoundness: the inner Pin<Box<F>> was accessed via self.0.as_mut() after
a Pin<&mut Self> projection, which bypasses pin guarantees because the
tuple field itself isn't structurally pinned.

Replace with a named-field struct using #[pin_project::pin_project] and a
#[pin]-annotated inner field. The poll() implementation now uses proper
structural pin projection via self.project().inner.as_mut().poll(cx),
maintaining pin invariants throughout.

Update all call sites in src/actor.rs and src/gen_server.rs to use the
new named-field constructor syntax (CatchUnwind { inner: Box::pin(...) })
instead of the old tuple constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
